hero.title: Who we are
hero.body: Simmico bridges the gap between IT and Marketing. Most businesses deal with two separate vendors, two separate strategies, and gaps in between. We fix that.

story: We started because we kept seeing the same problem: businesses hiring one agency for their website and another for their campaigns, then wondering why neither talked to the other. The tech team didn't understand the brand. The marketing team didn't understand the stack. Things fell through the cracks.
Simmico was built to close that gap. One team that handles both sides — the infrastructure and the identity, the systems and the strategy. When everything is managed together, it works together.

We're a South African team delivering full-coverage IT and marketing services for businesses that want to grow without the complexity. No silos. No handoff failures. Just clear thinking and solid execution.
mission: To give every business access to integrated IT and marketing expertise — delivered simply, built to last, and managed under one roof.

values.title: No unnecessary complexity
values.body: We give you what you need, explain it clearly, and don't overcomplicate the bill.

values.title: Both sides of the business
values.body: Your website, your systems, your brand and your campaigns all live under one roof.

values.title: Built to last
values.body: We build solutions that hold up — not quick fixes that need replacing in six months.

values.title: Straight talk
values.body: You get honest advice, clear timelines and real answers. Always.

team.heading: The team
team.body: A small, focused group of people who care about the work. We're building something worth being proud of.
